        document.getElementById('v5-async-p-dx').innerText = (dxF > 0 ? "+" : "") + dxF.toFixed(3) + " m";
        draw(offset);
    }
    function draw(offset) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 500, 400); const cx = 250, cy = 80, h = 240, b = 180;
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)'; ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        for(let i=0; i<10; i++) { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(i*50, 0); ctx.lineTo(i*50, 400); ctx.stroke(); }
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.2)'; ctx.strokeStyle = '#38bdf8'; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx+offset, cy); ctx.lineTo(cx-b/2, cy+h); ctx.lineTo(cx+b/2, cy+h); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill(); ctx.stroke();
        const ty = cy + (2/3)*h; ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx + offset/3, ty, 5, 0, 7); ctx.fill();
        const fy = cy + (3/4)*h; const fx = cx + (offset/3) + (offset/6);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(fx, fy, 7, 0, 7); ctx.fill();
    }
    slider.oninput = update; update();
})();
</script>
```

### Integracijska metoda: Sila kao suma elemenata
Sila je integral tlaka po površini: $F = \int p \, dA$. Ovaj widget vizualizira diferencijalni pristup gdje plohu dijelimo na beskonačno male horizontalne trake visine $dz$.

```{=html}
<!-- PREMIUM INTEGRATION VISUALIZER -->
<div id="v5-integration-premium" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 24px; padding: 35px; background: #0f172a; color: white; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.3fr 1fr; gap: 40px;">
        <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); border-radius: 20px; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); height: 400px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="v5-int-p-canvas" width="450" height="400" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div style="position: absolute; top: 20px; left: 20px; background: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.1); padding: 10px 15px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.3);">
                <code style="color: #38bdf8; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 800;">dF = &rho; · g · z · dA</code>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 25px;">
            <h4 style="color: #38bdf8; margin: 0; font-weight: 800;">📐 Diferencijalna analiza</h4>
            <input type="range" id="v5-int-p-slider" min="4" max="60" value="12" style="width: 100%;">
            <div id="v5-int-p-count" style="color: #38bdf8; font-weight: 800; text-align:center;">12 elemenata</div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v5-int-p-canvas'); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const slider = document.getElementById('v5-int-p-slider');
    function draw() {
        const count = parseInt(slider.value); document.getElementById('v5-int-p-count').innerText = count + " elemenata";
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 450, 400); const h = 280, w = 50, ox = 60, oy = 60, dz = h / count;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#f1f5f9'; ctx.fillRect(ox, oy, w, h);
        for(let i=0; i<count; i++) {
            let z = (i + 0.5) * dz; let p_scaled = (z / h) * 250;
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.3)'; ctx.fillRect(ox + w + 2, oy + i*dz + 1, p_scaled, dz - 2);
        }
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ox + w/2, oy + (2/3)*h, 7, 0, 7); ctx.fill();
    }
    slider.oninput = draw; draw();
})();
</script>
```

## 7. Master klasa: Dinamika promjena

### Usporedba orijentacija: Utjecaj nagiba na hvatište
Promatrajte kako se Centar tlaka ($F$) približava težištu ($T$) kako plohu polažemo vodoravno. U horizontalnom položaju ($\alpha = 0^\circ$), ekscentricitet potpuno nestaje jer je tlak uniforman.

```{=html}
<!-- ORIENTATION COMPARISON -->
<div id="v5-trend-master" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 32px; padding: 40px; background: #0f172a; color: white; box-shadow: 0 25px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);">
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 20px;">
        <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 20px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); text-align: center;">
            <span style="font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 800; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase;">Vertikalno (90°)</span>
            <canvas id="v5-trend-1" width="250" height="250" style="width: 100%; margin-top: 15px;"></canvas>
            <div style="margin-top: 15px; font-family: monospace; color: #f87171; font-weight: 700;">e = 14.2 cm</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 20px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); text-align: center;">
            <span style="font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 800; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase;">Nagnuto (45°)</span>
            <canvas id="v5-trend-2" width="250" height="250" style="width: 100%; margin-top: 15px;"></canvas>
            <div style="margin-top: 15px; font-family: monospace; color: #facc15; font-weight: 700;">e = 7.1 cm</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 20px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); text-align: center;">
            <span style="font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 800; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase;">Horizontalno (0°)</span>
            <canvas id="v5-trend-3" width="250" height="250" style="width: 100%; margin-top: 15px;"></canvas>
            <div style="margin-top: 15px; font-family: monospace; color: #10b981; font-weight: 700;">e = 0.0 cm</div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
    function drawT(id, deg) {
        const c = document.getElementById(id); const ctx = c.getContext('2d');
        const a = deg * Math.PI / 180; ctx.clearRect(0,0,250,250);
        ctx.save(); ctx.translate(125,125); ctx.rotate(Math.PI/2 - a);
        ctx.fillStyle='white'; ctx.fillRect(-10, -60, 20, 120);
        ctx.fillStyle='#3b82f6'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,5,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        if(deg > 0) { ctx.fillStyle='#ef4444'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0, 15, 6, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); }
        else { ctx.fillStyle='#10b981'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,6,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); }
        ctx.restore();
    }
    drawT('v5-trend-1', 90); drawT('v5-trend-2', 45); drawT('v5-trend-3', 0);
})();
</script>

### Slojeviti fluidi: Ulje iznad vode
Zbog različitih gustoća ($\rho_{ulje} < \rho_{voda}$), profil tlaka dobiva karakteristično "koljeno" na granici faza.

```{=html}
<!-- PREMIUM MULTI-FLUID ANALYZER -->
<div id="v5-multi-master-container" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 24px; padding: 35px; background: linear-gradient(145deg, #ffffff, #f1f5f9); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);">
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr; gap: 35px;">
        <div style="background: #ffffff; border-radius: 20px; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; height: 450px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="v5-multi-master-canvas" width="500" height="450" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div id="v5-p-suc-tag-final" style="position: absolute; right: 20px; background: #0f172a; color: #38bdf8; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 800; border: 1px solid #334155;">p_suč = 0 kPa</div>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="background: #fffbeb; padding: 25px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #fde68a;">
                <label style="font-weight: 800; color: #92400e; font-size: 0.75rem;">Gustoća ulja &rho;₁</label>
                <input type="range" id="v5-rho1-master-slider" min="500" max="950" step="10" value="800" style="width: 100%;">
                <div id="v5-rho1-master-label" style="text-align: right; font-family: monospace; font-weight: 800; color: #b45309;">800 kg/m³</div>
            </div>
            <div style="background: #0f172a; padding: 30px; border-radius: 24px; color: white;">
                <span id="v5-ftot-master-res" style="font-family: monospace; color: #f87171; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.5rem;">--- kN</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v5-multi-master-canvas'); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const r1S = document.getElementById('v5-rho1-master-slider'); const tag = document.getElementById('v5-p-suc-tag-final');
    function update() {
        const r1 = parseFloat(r1S.value); const r2 = 1000; const g = 9.81; const h1 = 1.5, h2 = 2.5;
        document.getElementById('v5-rho1-master-label').innerText = r1 + " kg/m³";
        const pI = r1 * g * h1; const pB = pI + r2 * g * h2;
        document.getElementById('v5-ftot-master-res').innerText = ((pI*h2 + r2*g*h2*h2/2 + r1*g*h1*h1/2)/1000).toFixed(1) + " kN";
        tag.style.top = (50 + h1 * 85 - 20) + "px"; tag.innerText = "p_suč = " + (pI/1000).toFixed(1) + " kPa";
        draw(r1, h1, h2, pI, pB);
    }
    function draw(r1, h1, h2, pI, pB) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 500, 450); const ox = 80, oy = 50, sy = 85, ps = 0.015;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#fef3c7'; ctx.fillRect(0, oy, 500, h1 * sy);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#e0f2fe'; ctx.fillRect(0, oy + h1 * sy, 500, h2 * sy);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e293b'; ctx.lineWidth = 6; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ox, oy); ctx.lineTo(ox, oy+(h1+h2)*sy); ctx.stroke();
        const pix = pI * ps; const pbx = pB * ps;
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(146, 64, 14, 0.15)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ox, oy); ctx.lineTo(ox+pix, oy+h1*sy); ctx.lineTo(ox, oy+h1*sy); ctx.fill();
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(3, 105, 161, 0.15)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ox, oy+h1*sy); ctx.lineTo(ox+pix, oy+h1*sy); ctx.lineTo(ox+pbx, oy+(h1+h2)*sy); ctx.lineTo(ox, oy+(h1+h2)*sy); ctx.fill();
    }
    r1S.oninput = update; update();
})();
</script>
```

***

### Zadaci 45-48: Integracijske metode i asimetrične plohe

### Zadatak 45: Vertikalna pravokutna zaklopka (Integral)
Potrebno je odrediti rezultirajuću silu tlaka i hvatište sile za vertikalnu pravokutnu plohu visine $h_z = 3 \, m$ i širine $b_z = 2 \, m$, čiji se gornji rub nalazi na dubini $h_1 = 2 \, m$.

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Z45 INTEGRATION RECTANGLE -->
<div id="v5-z45-container" class="mf1-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 24px; padding: 35px; background: #0f172a; color: white; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.3fr 1fr; gap: 40px;">
        <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); border-radius: 20px; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); height: 450px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="v5-z45-canvas" width="450" height="450" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div id="v5-z45-df-tag" style="position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 20px; background: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.1); padding: 10px 15px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #38bdf8;">
                <code style="color: #38bdf8; font-size: 0.9rem;">dF = ρ g (h1+z) b dz</code>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 25px;">
            <h4 style="color: #38bdf8; margin: 0; font-weight: 800;">📐 Integralna metoda</h4>
            <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); padding: 20px; border-radius: 16px;">
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #94a3b8; margin-bottom: 10px;">DUBINA h1 [m]</label>
                <input type="range" id="v5-z45-h1-slider" min="1" max="5" step="0.1" value="2" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <button id="v5-z45-play" style="padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; background: #3b82f6; color: white; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.2s;">▶ POKRENI INTEGRACIJU</button>
            <div style="background: #1e293b; padding: 20px; border-radius: 16px; border-left: 4px solid #f87171;">
                <span style="color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.75rem;">UKUPNA SILA F:</span>
                <div id="v5-z45-f-res" style="font-family: monospace; color: #f87171; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.4rem;">206.0 kN</div>
            </div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #94a3b8; line-height: 1.5;">
                Rezultat: $z_{Fh} = \mathbf{3,633 \, m}$
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v5-z45-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const playBtn = document.getElementById('v5-z45-play');
    const h1S = document.getElementById('v5-z45-h1-slider');
    let animating = false;

    function update() {
        if(!animating) draw(0);
        const h1 = parseFloat(h1S.value);
        const hz = 3.0; const b = 2.0; const rho = 1000; const g = 9.81;
        const zT = h1 + hz/2;
        const F = (rho * g * zT * hz * b) / 1000;
        document.getElementById('v5-z45-f-res').innerText = F.toFixed(1) + " kN";
    }

    function draw(zAnim) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 450, 450);
        const h1 = parseFloat(h1S.value);
        const hz = 3.0; const b = 2.0; const scale = 60;
        const ox = 150; const oy = 50;
        const waterY = oy;
        const gateTopY = oy + h1 * scale;

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.1)';
        ctx.fillRect(0, waterY, 450, 400);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#38bdf8'; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, waterY); ctx.lineTo(450, waterY); ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8'; ctx.lineWidth = 8;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ox, gateTopY); ctx.lineTo(ox, gateTopY + hz*scale); ctx.stroke();

        if(zAnim > 0) {
            ctx.fillStyle = '#f87171';
            ctx.fillRect(ox, gateTopY + zAnim*scale - 2, 150, 4);
        }
    }

    playBtn.onclick = () => {
        if(animating) return;
        animating = true;
        let z = 0;
        const interval = setInterval(() => {
            z += 0.05;
            if(z > 3.0) {
                clearInterval(interval);
                animating = false;
                draw(0);
            } else {
                draw(z);
            }
        }, 30);
    };

    h1S.oninput = update;
    update();
})();
</script>
```

### Zadatak 46: Vertikalna trokutna zaklopka (Integral)
Potrebno je odrediti silu i hvatište za trokutnu zaklopku baze $b_z = 4 \, m$ i visine $h_z = 3 \, m$.

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Z46 TRIANGULAR INTEGRATION -->
<div id="v5-z46-container" class="mf1-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 24px; padding: 35px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);">
    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #10b981 0%, #059669 100%); padding: 20px; margin: -35px -35px 25px -35px; color: white;">
        <h4 style="margin: 0; color: white; font-weight: 800;">📐 Zadatak 46: Trokutna integracija</h4>
    </div>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr; gap: 30px; margin-top: 20px;">
        <canvas id="v5-z46-canvas" width="500" height="400" style="background:#f8fafc; border-radius:16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;"></canvas>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <button id="v5-z46-play" style="padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; background: #10b981; color: white; border: none; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.2s;">▶ POGLEDAJ DIFERENCIJALNI ELEMENT</button>
            <div style="background: #f1f5f9; padding: 20px; border-radius: 16px; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #475569; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <b style="color: #059669;">x(z) = b (h_z - z) / h_z</b><br>
                Širina trake se linearno smanjuje s dubinom. Kod integracije, ovo značajno mijenja doprinos svakog sloja ukupnoj sili.
            </div>
            <div style="background: #0f172a; padding: 20px; border-radius: 16px; color: white;">
                <span style="color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.7rem;">REZULTAT:</span>
                <div style="font-family: monospace; font-weight: 800; color: #f87171;">z_Fh = 7,071 m</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v5-z46-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const btn = document.getElementById('v5-z46-play');
    let anim = false;

    function draw(zAnim) {
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,500,400);
        const h = 3.0; const b = 4.0; const scale = 80;
        const ox = 250; const oy = 50;

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.3)';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox - (b/2)*scale, oy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox + (b/2)*scale, oy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox, oy + h*scale);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e293b'; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.stroke();

        if(zAnim > 0) {
            const curW = b * (h - zAnim) / h;
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444';
            ctx.fillRect(ox - (curW/2)*scale, oy + zAnim*scale - 2, curW*scale, 4);
        }
    }

    btn.onclick = () => {
        if(anim) return;
        anim = true; let z = 0;
        const i = setInterval(() => {
            z += 0.05;
            if(z > 3.0) { clearInterval(i); anim = false; draw(0); }
            else draw(z);
        }, 30);
    };
    draw(0);
})();
</script>
```

### Zadatak 47: Nakošena pravokutna zaklopka (30°)
Pravokutna zaklopka duljine $h_z = 2 \, m$ i širine $b_z = 3 \, m$ nagnuta je pod kutom $\alpha = 30^\circ$, s gornjim rubom na dubini $h_1 = 8 \, m$.

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Z47 INCLINED RECTANGLE -->
<div id="v5-z47-container" class="mf1-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 24px; padding: 35px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);">
    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1 0%, #4338ca 100%); padding: 20px; margin: -35px -35px 25px -35px; color: white; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
        <h4 style="margin: 0; color: white; font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.25rem;">📐 Zadatak 47: Nagnuti pravokutnik</h4>
        <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); padding: 5px 15px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700;">α = 30°</div>
    </div>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.5fr 1fr; gap: 35px;">
        <div style="background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; position: relative; height: 400px; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="v5-z47-canvas" width="500" height="400" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="background: #f1f5f9; padding: 20px; border-radius: 16px;">
                <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 8px;">DUBINA VRHA h1 [m]</label>
                <input type="range" id="v5-z47-h1-slider" min="5" max="12" step="0.1" value="8" style="width: 100%;">
                <div style="text-align: right; font-family: monospace; font-weight: 800; color: #6366f1;"><span id="v5-z47-h1-val">8.0</span> m</div>
            </div>
            <div style="background: #0f172a; padding: 25px; border-radius: 20px; color: white;">
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 10px;">
                    <span style="color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.8rem;">z_T:</span>
                    <span id="v5-z47-zt" style="font-family: monospace; color: #38bdf8;">8.50 m</span>
                </div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px dashed #334155;">
                    <span style="font-weight: 800; color: #38bdf8;">z_Fh:</span>
                    <span id="v5-z47-zf" style="font-family: monospace; font-weight: 900; color: #f87171; font-size: 1.2rem;">9.037 m</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v5-z47-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const h1S = document.getElementById('v5-z47-h1-slider');

    function update() {
        const h1 = parseFloat(h1S.value);
        const hz = 2.0; const alpha = 30 * Math.PI / 180;
        const zT = h1 + (hz/2) * Math.sin(alpha);
        const yTi = h1 / Math.sin(alpha) + hz/2;
        const yFi = yTi + (hz*hz) / (12 * yTi);
        const zFh = yFi * Math.sin(alpha);

        document.getElementById('v5-z47-h1-val').innerText = h1.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v5-z47-zt').innerText = zT.toFixed(2) + " m";
        document.getElementById('v5-z47-zf').innerText = zFh.toFixed(3) + " m";
        draw(h1, alpha, hz, zFh);
    }

    function draw(h1, alpha, hz, zFh) {
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,500,400);
        const scale = 20; const ox = 100; const oy = 40;
        const gateTopY = oy + h1 * scale;
        
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.1)';
        ctx.fillRect(0, oy, 500, 360);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#6366f1'; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, oy); ctx.lineTo(500, oy); ctx.stroke();

        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(ox, gateTopY);
        ctx.rotate(alpha);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e293b'; ctx.lineWidth = 6;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,0); ctx.lineTo(hz*scale, 0); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.restore();

        const fy = oy + zFh * scale;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ox + (zFh-h1)/Math.tan(alpha)*scale, fy, 6, 0, 7); ctx.fill();
    }
    h1S.oninput = update; update();
})();
</script>
```

### Zadatak 48: Asimetrična trokutna zaklopka
Kod asimetričnih ploha, raspodjela tlaka uzrokuje bočni pomak hvatišta $\Delta x$ definiran centrifugalnim momentom tromosti $I_{xz}$.

```{=html}
<!-- PREMIUM ASYMMETRY LAB (Z48) -->
<div id="v5-z48-container" class="mf1-widget" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 24px; padding: 35px; background: #0f172a; color: white; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 300px; gap: 35px;">
        <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); border-radius: 20px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); height: 400px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="v5-z48-canvas" width="500" height="400" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div style="position: absolute; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; background: rgba(15,23,42,0.8); padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #ef4444; font-size: 0.7rem;">
                <span style="color: #ef4444; font-weight: 800;">Δx_i = I_xz sin α / (z_T A)</span>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); padding: 20px; border-radius: 16px;">
                <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.75rem;">DEFORMACIJA TROKUTA (s)</label>
                <input type="range" id="v5-z48-s-slider" min="-150" max="150" value="80" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div style="background: #1e293b; padding: 25px; border-radius: 20px; border-left: 4px solid #ef4444;">
                <span style="color: #f1f5f9; font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.85rem;">POMAK Δx_F:</span>
                <span id="v5-z48-dx" style="font-family: monospace; color: #f87171; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.4rem; display:block;">-0.286 m</span>
            </div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #94a3b8; font-style: italic;">
                💡 Uoči kako nesimetrija (pomak vrha) uzrokuje da centar tlaka "pobjegne" u stranu.
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v5-z48-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const sS = document.getElementById('v5-z48-s-slider');

    function update() {
        const offset = parseFloat(sS.value);
        const dxF = (offset / 280); 
        document.getElementById('v5-z48-dx').innerText = (dxF > 0 ? "+" : "") + dxF.toFixed(3) + " m";
        draw(offset);
    }

    function draw(offset) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 500, 400);
        const cx = 250, cy = 80, h = 240, b = 180;
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'; ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        for(let i=0; i<10; i++) { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(i*50, 0); ctx.lineTo(i*50, 400); ctx.stroke(); }
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.2)'; ctx.strokeStyle = '#38bdf8'; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(cx + offset, cy);
        ctx.lineTo(cx - b/2, cy + h);
        ctx.lineTo(cx + b/2, cy + h);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill(); ctx.stroke();
        const tx = cx + offset/3; const ty = cy + (2/3)*h;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(tx, ty, 5, 0, 7); ctx.fill();
        const fx = tx + (offset/6); const fy = ty + 30;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(fx, fy, 7, 0, 7); ctx.fill();
        ctx.setLineDash([2,2]); ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)';
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(tx, ty); ctx.lineTo(fx, ty); ctx.lineTo(fx, fy); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
    }
    sS.oninput = update; update();
})();
</script>
```

***

### Zaključak vježbe
Hidrostatska sila ovisi o tlaku u težištu plohe, dok njezino hvatište ovisi o geometriji plohe i raspodjeli tlaka. Kod nagnutih ploha proračune započnite definiranjem koordinate y duž kosine.
